headline: GE Vernova’s US Japan SMR Role And What It Means For Valuation
summary: GE Vernova (NYSE:GEV) and Hitachi are named lead developers in a new US$40b US Japan small modular nuclear reactor initiative. The plan focuses on deploying BWRX-300 reactors, with initial projects in Tennessee and Alabama. The initiative is backed by both governments and ties GE Vernova to a broader global push for low carbon baseload power. For investors watching NYSE:GEV, this move places the company at the center of a government supported buildout of small modular nuclear reactors. The...
